---
title: "Learning Module Homework"
author: "YOUR NAME HERE"
format: dyerlab-html
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
source("_extensions/dyerlab/theme_dyerlab.R")
library(ggplot2)
theme_set(theme_dyerlab())
```

## Impetus



## Resources & Logistics



## Activity

```{r}
# Your code here
hist( rnorm( 1000) ) 
```



```{r}
library( tidyverse ) 

iris |> 
    ggplot( aes(x=Sepal.Width, fill=Species) ) +
    geom_density( alpha = 0.75) + 
    xlab("Sepal Width (cm)") + 
    ylab("Frequency")

```
